case_name: Raja Hari Kishan vs Central Bureau of Investigation
summary: Bail in embezzlement by public servant
key_holding: Embezzlement by public officials is serious but doesn't warrant indefinite detention. Bail should be available after preliminary investigation.
impact: Protected bail rights even in serious economic crimes
full_text: Abuse of public position is serious, but presumption of innocence applies. Bail can be granted with stringent conditions.
